rationale: A visible demonstration of our combat-ready forces near the frontline will shatter enemy morale and signal unwavering resolve to the international community.
Deploying our fleet in key waters asserts dominance and counters enemy narratives of strategic parity, amplifying pressure amid ongoing sanctions.
Persistent surveillance ensures we retain battlefield awareness and can exploit any future weakness the moment it emerges.
Our forces are vulnerable to infiltration as the conflict drags on; we must secure our command structures and operational plans to maintain battlefield integrity.
With recent attacks on major power banks, reinforcing our financial and military cyber infrastructure is critical to prevent cascading systemic failures.
To exploit any emerging weaknesses, we must deepen our human and signals intelligence inside Tethys, especially along supply and command nodes.
A coordinated resource embargo on Tethys will exploit our current economic leverage and degrade their warfighting capacity, aligning with international support for decisive action.
Targeting key Tethyan defense industries and oligarch networks will maximize economic pressure while minimizing blowback, reinforcing military and cyber operations.
Broadening sanctions in coordination with allies amplifies systemic strain on Tethys, complementing the military show of force by weakening their economic resilience.
A visible demonstration of military readiness will exploit Novaris's current vulnerability and deter further aggression while bolstering domestic morale.
Deploying naval assets near contested waters signals resolve and reinforces our regional strength without escalating to full conflict.
Persistent intelligence gathering on enemy movements ensures we detect any regrouping or redeployment before it threatens frontline stability.
Exploit our intelligence advantage to disrupt Novaris’s command and logistics systems, degrading their regrouping efforts while maintaining plausible deniability.
Conduct targeted sabotage against key supply depots to delay enemy reinforcements and complement our cyber operations with physical disruption.
Seed false narratives within Novaris’s military networks to exacerbate confusion and erode trust in their chain of command during this critical regrouping phase.

With international support at 63% and sanctions currently light, we can leverage coalition momentum to impose coordinated economic sanctions that amplify pressure on Novaris without overextending our own resources.

By focusing on key individuals and entities within Novaris’s military-industrial complex, we maintain precision in economic pressure while minimizing blowback and preserving room for future diplomatic de-escalation.
Engaging neutral countries in trade talks now strengthens our economic resilience and builds goodwill, potentially converting diplomatic sympathy into concrete support for broader sanction adherence.
Establishing safe passage for civilians reinforces our moral high ground and leverages international sympathy to increase pressure on Novaris without escalating militarily.
Engaging neutral states through institutional partnerships strengthens diplomatic momentum and isolates Novaris further in preparation for potential peace talks.
Offering a humanitarian exchange demonstrates goodwill and de-escalatory intent, creating space for backchannel diplomacy while maintaining domestic and international support.
